notes: Manual extract from the public Defence Annual Report 2024-25. Workforce figures are not readiness or deployability measures.
source_rights: Commonwealth copyright; Defence copyright terms apply
citation: Department of Defence, Defence Annual Report 2024-25, workforce chapter and annual performance statements.

reserve_paid_service.boundary: Reserve paid-service days are not a standing readiness measure.

fields.boundary: Workforce rows describe staffing outcomes and paid reserve activity. They do not indicate combat readiness, operational availability or deployable strength.
